_comment: Agentic-dev preset - RBAC policy (piece 5). POST wrapped as {policy:...} to /rbac. Opt-in and deny-by-default WITHIN this policy; a workspace with no rbac.json stays fully permissive (single-agent = zero config). Grants gate the /actions/invoke path. The principal's role comes from the authenticated JWT, never from a request field. See docs/RBAC_SPEC.md.
name: rbac
